data.name: Message
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: DevelopmentModeText
data.value: Switching to the Development environment displays detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: DevelopmentWarning
data.value: The Development environment should not be enabled for deployed applications.

data.name: DevelopmentWarningDetail
data.value: It can show sensitive exception information to users. For local debugging, enable the ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT environment variable with the Development value and restart the app.
